data.title: Hassett responded to the October non-farm payroll data: An employment report will be released, but the unemployment rate will not be published.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated regarding the October non-farm payroll data that an employment report will be released, but the unemployment rate will not be published. (Jinshi Data APP)

data.title: Analysis: Grayscale publicly filed for an IPO, betting on the future of digital assets and seeking compliance.
data.description: Grayscale has publicly filed for an initial public offering (IPO), becoming the latest cryptocurrency-related company to test the waters of the public market amid growing US government openness towards digital assets. According to a filing with the US Securities and Exchange Commission on Thursday, the crypto asset management firm reported revenue of $318.7 million and net income of $203.3 million in the nine months ending September 30. This compares to $397.9 million in revenue and $223.7 million in net income a year earlier. The company had previously filed for listing privately in July. With the end of the US government shutdown, IPO activity is expected to accelerate before the end of the year. Even so, considering the required waiting periods and holidays, only a few weeks remain on the 2025 calendar for potential IPOs. The filing shows that Grayscale currently manages approximately $35 billion in assets and offers more than 40 products, providing exposure to over 45 tokens.

data.title: US stocks opened with mixed results for the crypto sector, with Circle down 1.03%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.28%, the S&P 500 fell 0.44%, and the Nasdaq fell 0.67%. The crypto sector was mixed, with Circle down 1.03%, BitMine down 1.63%, and Robinhood up 0.24%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Hassett: I don't see many reasons not to cut interest rates.
data.description: White House National Economic Council Director Hassett stated that he sees little reason not to cut interest rates, and expects fourth-quarter GDP to decline by 1.5% due to the government shutdown. (Jinshi)

data.title: Perpetual futures DEX Pacifica takes the top spot on Solana
data.description:
Pacifica became the top Solana perp DEX, surpassing Jupiter and leading on the daily, weekly, and monthly trading volume.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/pacifica-takes-the-top-spot-on-solana/

data.title: Telegram CEO Pavel Durov free to leave France as travel ban lifted: Report
data.description:
Telegram CEO Pavel Durov is now free to travel after French authorities lifted the ban on his travel, although the investigation into the platform remains open.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/telegram-ceo-pavel-durov-france-travel-ban-lifted?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Federal Reserve's Hammarck: Inflation returning to 2% is crucial
data.description: Federal Reserve official Hamack stated that a return to 2% inflation is crucial, noting that high inflation persists and expressing concern about the labor market. (Jinshi)

data.title: Uniswap Introduces Continuous Liquidation Auction Protocol (CCA)
data.description: Uniswap announced the launch of the Continuous Clearing Auction Protocol (CCA) on its X platform. CCA is a customizable protocol for launching liquidity and issuing tokens on Uniswap v4. Designed in partnership with Aztec, the protocol provides a ZK Passport module for private and verifiable participation.

data.title: Bitcoin and crypto stocks sit out U.S. market rebound as the Dow makes another ATH
data.description:
The Dow Jones Industrial Average closed Wednesday at 48,254. 82, sealing yet another record high. Futures for the Dow ahead of today’s open ticked slightly lower by around 0. 1%. Meanwhile, the Bitcoin price is hovering in the $102,000 range this morning, having opened around $101,652. 80 and before dipping to lows near $100,997. 50. Trading volume for Bitcoin […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-and-crypto-stocks-sit-out-u-s-market-rebound-as-the-dow-makes-another-ath/

data.title: Crypto payment platform MoonPay launches enterprise stablecoin service
data.description: Crypto payment platform MoonPay announced the launch of its enterprise stablecoin business. The company also announced an integration with the open infrastructure MO to support developers of application-oriented stablecoins. This integration reportedly enables MoonPay to issue and manage fully reserved digital dollars across multiple blockchains, providing enterprises with tools to deploy customized and interoperable stablecoins at scale. (PRNewswire)

data.title: Today, US Bitcoin ETFs saw a net outflow of 2,300 BTC, and Ethereum ETFs saw a net outflow of 54,389 ETH.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, 10 US Bitcoin ETFs saw a net outflow of 2,300 BTC today, with Fidelity experiencing an outflow of 1,308 BTC, and currently holding 200,746 BTC; 9 Ethereum ETFs saw a net outflow of 54,389 ETH, with BlackRock experiencing an outflow of 26,610 ETH, and currently holding 3,871,959 ETH.

data.title: Upexi Announces $50 Million Share Buyback Plan
data.description: According to Odaily, Upexi, a Solana treasury company listed on Nasdaq, has announced that its board of directors has approved a share repurchase program. The company plans to buy back $50 million worth of its outstanding common stock. The timing, method, price, and quantity of the repurchase will be determined by management based on factors such as stock price, market conditions, and available liquidity.

data.title: Whale Investor Opens New Wallet After Profitable ETH Trade
data.description: According to Odaily, a whale investor recently closed a long position of 10,695 ETH, securing a profit of $335,000. Following this, the investor created a new wallet and deposited 5.66 million USDC into it. The funds were used to open a 25x leveraged long position on ETH, currently holding 7,695 ETH valued at $26.1 million.

data.title: Monad selects Anchorage Digital as its token custody provider.
data.description: Crypto service platform Anchorage Digital will provide custody support for Monad's native token MON, allowing asset holders to hold and stake MON through Anchorage Digital's custody platform or its institutional-grade self-custodied wallet, Porto. Monad is scheduled to launch its Layer 1 blockchain and native token on Monday, November 24th at 9:00 AM Eastern Time. (The Block)

data.title: Circle launches StableFX, an institutional-grade forex engine, and the Partner Stablecoins program to expand its multi-currency stablecoin ecosystem.
data.description: Circle has announced two new products based on its Arc blockchain (with a mainnet launch planned for 2026): Circle StableFX and Circle Partner Stablecoins. Circle StableFX: This is an institutional-grade, stablecoin-based foreign exchange (FX) engine, currently available on the Arc public testnet. It allows institutions to trade selected stablecoin currency pairs 24/7 via RFQ (Request for Quote) execution, offering competitive pricing, reduced counterparty risk, and on-chain settlement. Circle Partner Stablecoins: This initiative aims to support selected regional stablecoin issuers in deploying their non-USD stablecoins on Arc. Initial partners include Avenia (BRLA), Busan Digital Asset Custody Services (KRW1), and Coins.ph (PHPC), covering multiple currencies such as the Brazilian Real, South Korean Won, and Philippine Peso. Circle states that StableFX, Partner Stablecoins, and Arc together form a unified stack that connects global currencies on-chain, aiming to upgrade foreign exchange settlement from T+1 to real-time settlement and promote more efficient global currency flows. (Circle Blog)

data.title: Czech National Bank Bitcoin Purchase: $1M Pilot in 2025
data.description:
Czech central bank launches $1M Bitcoin and crypto pilot purchase in November 2025.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/czech-national-bank-bitcoin-purchase-pilot-2025

data.title: Solana Treasury's Upexi launches $50 million stock buyback program
data.description: Upexi, a Nasdaq-listed treasury company specializing in Solana assets, announced that its board of directors has approved a share repurchase program to buy back $50 million of its outstanding common stock. The timing, method, price, and quantity of the repurchase will be determined by management at its discretion based on factors such as share price, market conditions, and available liquidity. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Brother Machi continues to add to his long positions in ETH and UNI, and his current position value exceeds $16 million.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Brother Machi has continued to increase his long positions in ETH and UNI, with the current position value reaching $16.2 million. Among them, the ETH long position with 25x leverage currently holds 4,500 ETH, with a liquidation price of $3,153.53; the UNI long position with 10x leverage currently holds 88,888.8 UNI, both of which are currently in a floating loss state.

data.title: A whale closed its long position of 10,695 ETH, making a profit of $335,000, and then opened another long position of ETH with 25x leverage.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale closed its long position of 10,695 ETH, making a profit of $335,000. After that, it created a new wallet and deposited 5.66 million USDC into the new wallet to open a 25x leveraged long position in ETH. The current position is 7,695 ETH, worth $26.1 million.
